LAW AND MOTION, 302, PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL FAILED TO SHOW PROOF THAT HE GAVE NOTICE TO DEFENDANT OF HIS APPEARANCE IN COURT TODAY. THE MATTER WAS NOT DISCUSSED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS OFF CALENDAR. MOVING PARTY'S SERVICE BY MAIL ON FEBRUARY 14, 2013 IS UNTIMELY. (CCP 12C(A), 1005(B), 1013(A).) JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Fmtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar May-20-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is granted. No opposition filed. The Court signed the Order and the Judgment that were sent by email. Judge: Richard Kramer; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Mar-11-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Robert F. Cohen, Esq. of the Law Office of Robert Cohen, Tel. 310.858.9771, appearing specially for the plaintiff;
No other appearance.

Plaintiff's counsel failed to show proof that he gave notice to defendant of his appearance in court today. The matter was not discussed and the court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is Off calendar. Moving party's service by mail on February 14, 2013 is untimely. (CCP 12c(a), 1005(b), 1013(a).) Judge: A. James Robertson; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
